message:
feat(fwc): add tail/watch commands for streaming and operation monitoring

Wire event_stream module types into CLI with tail and watch commands:
- `fwc tail [connector] --since 5m` for event stream tailing
- `fwc watch <operation_id>` for operation status monitoring
- TailConfig, TailPlan, StreamStatus, ConnectorStreamState types
- Dry-run mode, since-duration parsing, cursor/resume support
- 7 new tests, readiness/recovery integration

FWC total: 10,250 tests (1 pre-existing credential_store failure)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
